content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "AI-powered suggestions", "Built-in ad blocker", and "Works fully offline", but ContentView.swift (the app's only source file) implements just a plain local `tasks` array with no AI/ML, no ad-blocking, and no offline-sync logic (App/ContentView.swift:1-18).
Pierre: Apple's App Review will actually test these claimed features, and unsupported claims like "AI-powered" or "ad blocker" risk a 2.3.1/2.3 rejection for misleading metadata. I found no CoreML/CreateML import, no content-blocking extension, and no offline caching code — only a simple to-do list. Either implement these features or remove the claims from the description before submission.
